case_title: CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICES VS OCCIDENTAL EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OCCIDENTAL EXPRESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,115.59 FILED BY CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT OCCIDENTAL EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCCIDENTAL EXPRESS $2,115.59 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
